post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests
Create new user without the need to be logged in.

get.description: Get a specific user by id.
Return image prompts for a specific scene.
List prompts across a book with optional filters and pagination.
Fetch a single image prompt by identifier.
Return a paginated list of scene extractions with optional filters.
Expose the available filter options for scene extractions.
Fetch a single scene extraction by its identifier.
Return the highest ranked scenes for a book with optional filters.
Return ranking history for a specific scene.
Fetch a single scene ranking by identifier.
List generated images with optional filters and pagination.

Fetch a single generated image by identifier with full context.
Returns image metadata along with prompt text and raw scene text.

patch.description: Update the approval status of a generated image.

get.description: Stream the binary image file for a generated image.
Return generated images for a specific scene extraction.
Return generated images for a specific image prompt.

post.description: Trigger subtle remix prompt generation for a specific generated image.

Trigger image generation for a selection of prompts.

This endpoint allows you to generate images based on various filters:
- By book_slug (optionally with chapter_range)
- By specific scene_ids
- By specific prompt_ids

In dry-run mode, it will return a count of 0 and no IDs.
Otherwise, it returns the list of generated image IDs.
